_NOTE: TRIAL RUN - Boston Round group descriptions. Review before patching to DB. Color-agnostic and applicator-agnostic (paper-doll ready). Schwartz/Ogilvy framing: lead with the transformation, not the spec.

boston-round-15ml.description: The half-ounce Boston Round is the format perfumers reach for when they need a sample that feels like a finished product. Its rounded shoulder and 18-400 neck accept roll-on fitments, droppers, and screw caps interchangeably. One bottle, every application your customer might ask for.

boston-round-30ml.description: A one-ounce apothecary silhouette trusted across fragrance, wellness, and beard-care lines for decades. The 30ml Boston Round's 20-400 neck pairs with roll-ons, droppers, and standard closures, making it the most versatile mid-format bottle in the catalog for brands that ship multiple product types from a single SKU.

boston-round-60ml.description: The two-ounce Boston Round carries enough volume for a full retail offering: essential oil sets, therapeutic blends, or signature fragrance oils. The 20-400 neck keeps it compatible with the same closures as its 30ml counterpart. A proven choice when your customer is ready to commit beyond the sample size.
